title: Infosys to Acquire 75% Stake in Versent Group from Telstra
detailed_summary: Infosys announced that its wholly owned subsidiary Infosys Singapore Pte. Ltd. will enter into an agreement with Telstra Limited to acquire 75% of the equity share capital in Telstra Purple Pty Ltd, referred to as Versent Group, for AUD 233.25 million for the 75% stake, including upfront and deferred consideration, including earnouts, and excluding management incentives and retention bonus. Telstra will retain a 25% minority stake, while Infosys will have operational control and majority shareholder rights. Versent Group provides cloud and digital transformation services in Australia, has 650 engineers, advisors and strategists, and reported FY25 revenues of AUD 211.4 million. The transaction is expected to close during the second half of fiscal year 2026, subject to regulatory approvals and customary closing conditions.

key_facts.fact: Infosys will acquire 75% of the shareholding in Versent Group, a wholly owned subsidiary of Telstra Group, while Telstra will retain a 25% minority stake.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and Telstra Announce Joint Venture in Australia

key_facts.fact: Infosys will have operational control of Versent Group after the transaction.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and Telstra Announce Joint Venture in Australia

key_facts.fact: The cost of acquisition is AUD 233.25 million for 75% stake, including upfront, and deferred consideration, including earnouts; excluding management incentives, and retention bonus.
Versent Group has a team of 650 engineers, advisors, strategists spread across Australia.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and Telstra Announce Joint Venture in Australia

key_facts.fact: Versent Group primarily serves large blue-chip organisations with established presence in government & education, financial institutions, energy and utilities sector.
FY25 (Fiscal year ending June 30th): Revenues of AUD 211.4 million.
The transaction is expected to close during second half of fiscal year 2026, subject to regulatory approvals and customary closing conditions.

corporate_actions.description: Infosys Singapore Pte Ltd., a wholly owned subsidiary of Infosys Limited, will acquire 75% of the equity share capital in Telstra Purple Pty Ltd.
corporate_actions.amount_or_ratio: AUD 233.25 million for 75% stake, including upfront, and deferred consideration, including earnouts; excluding management incentives, and retention bonus.

partnerships_or_deals.description: Infosys announced the formation of a joint venture with Telstra in Australia to accelerate AI-enabled cloud and digital solutions for Australian businesses, combining Telstra's connectivity, Versent's local digital engineering expertise, and Infosys' global scale.
partnerships_or_deals.section_heading: Infosys and Telstra Announce Joint Venture in Australia

risk_factors.risk: The transaction is subject to regulatory approvals and customary closing conditions.
risk_factors.potential_impact: The transaction is expected to close during second half of fiscal year 2026 only if these conditions are satisfied.

risk_factors.risk: Approval is required from the Foreign Investment Review Board of Australia and the Australian Competition and Consumer Commission.
